metadata.description: Claude Code standards for shipping production-grade software — Flutter, API (NestJS + Prisma), and Web (Next.js) packs. Install a full stack bundle and Claude auto-applies the standards. Zero CLAUDE.md edits.

plugins.name: flutter-standards
plugins.description: Flutter full bundle — 9 auto-invoke standards skills (craft, engineering, widget rules, api-data, testing, a11y, performance, forms, observability) + 8 audit/scaffold skills + 3 agents. Claude applies standards automatically when you touch Flutter code. Agents load companion standards on invocation.

plugins.name: flutter-pre-ship
plugins.description: Full quality gate before declaring done — craft, engineering, a11y, perf, tests. Audit skill.

plugins.name: flutter-premium-check
plugins.description: Audit a screen against the craft standard — typography, spacing, motion, state clarity.

plugins.name: flutter-verify-screens
plugins.description: Trace data pipeline source → screen to confirm every widget reads from a real source, not mock data.

plugins.name: flutter-find-hardcoded
plugins.description: Scan lib/ for design-system violations — hex colors, magic EdgeInsets, inline TextStyle, ad-hoc Durations.

plugins.name: flutter-find-duplicates
plugins.description: Scan lib/ for DRY violations — duplicate widgets, helpers, providers, mappers, copy-pasted card/button code.

plugins.name: flutter-accessibility-audit
plugins.description: Scan lib/ for a11y violations — missing Semantics, color-alone signals, tiny touch targets, placeholder-only fields, missing autofill hints, RTL gaps.

plugins.name: flutter-scaffold-screen
plugins.description: Generate a new screen with all 4 states wired (loading, empty, error, content), design tokens referenced, state mgmt detected.

plugins.name: flutter-scaffold-feature
plugins.description: Generate a full feature folder — model, mapper, repository, data sources, providers, screen, widgets, test stubs, README.

plugins.name: api-standards
plugins.description: API full bundle — 2 auto-invoke standards skills (nestjs, code-quality) + sync-migrate workflow skill + api-documenter + security-reviewer agents. Claude applies standards automatically on NestJS + Prisma code. Agents load companion standards on invocation.

plugins.name: api-sync-migrate
plugins.description: Prisma schema change workflow — edit, generate client, create migration, remind to sync downstream consumers.

plugins.name: web-standards
plugins.description: Web full bundle — 1 auto-invoke standards skill (nextjs) + pre-ship + premium-check audit skills for Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Claude applies standards automatically on web code.

plugins.name: web-pre-ship
plugins.description: Pre-ship quality gate for web — lint, data pipeline, state design, responsive, dark mode check.

plugins.name: web-premium-check
plugins.description: Premium craft audit for a single web component — tokens, state design, visual polish, responsive, a11y.

plugins.name: core-hooks
plugins.description: Cross-stack safety hooks — block edits to secrets (.env, keys, credentials) and dangerous shell commands. Registers PreToolUse hooks automatically.
